---
name: Bug Report
description: Report an issue to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

## Reproduction Steps

```bash
# 1. Run command...
./mvnw spring-boot:run

# 2. Input...
> USER: ...

# 3. See error...
```

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment Information

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Java Version**: `java -version` output
- **Maven Version**: `./mvnw --version` output
- **Application Version**: [e.g., 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT]

## Log Output

```
Paste relevant log output here
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as screenshots, related configurations, etc.
